name: gstreamer-rs-workflow
description: Implements gstreamer-deepstream-workflow.md: skills that encode GStreamer/DeepStream debugging instincts (failure-class triage, pipeline reduction, thread/object-lifetime review, fork policy, reconnect-repro), a PIPELINE.md scaffolder, harness/fault-server contract stubs, and an optional env-gated reminder that surfaces the lifetime checklist when editing the forked element. Extends the base agentic-workflow and embedded-target workflows.
